nonzero(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.
rowHasNZ(R) :- nonzero(R, _, _).
colHasNZ(C) :- nonzero(_, C, _).
minRow = #min{ R : rowHasNZ(R) }.
maxRow = #max{ R : rowHasNZ(R) }.
minCol = #min{ C : colHasNZ(C) }.
maxCol = #max{ C : colHasNZ(C) }.
outRows(N) :- N = maxRow - minRow + 1.
outCols(M) :- M = maxCol - minCol + 1.
rowOut(R) :- outRows(N), R >= 0, R < N.
colOut(C) :- outCols(M), C >= 0, C < M.
output_cell(R,C) :- rowOut(R), colOut(C).
output(R,C,Color) :- output_cell(R,C), input(R + minRow, C + minCol, Color).
#show output/3.
